label: Population density
definition: County population (ACS B01003) divided by TIGER land area in km².

label: Median age
definition: Median age of the population (ACS B01002).

label: Hispanic / Latino share
definition: Residents identifying as Hispanic or Latino (ACS B03003).

label: Black share
definition: Residents identifying as Black or African American (ACS B02001).

label: Foreign-born share
definition: Residents born outside the United States (ACS B05002).

label: Veteran share (18+)
definition: Civilian veterans among adults 18+ (ACS B21001).

label: Median household income
definition: Median household income (ACS B19013).

label: Income per capita
definition: Per-capita income in the past 12 months (ACS B19301).

label: Income inequality (Gini)
definition: Gini index of household income inequality (ACS B19083).

label: Poverty rate
definition: People below the federal poverty line (ACS B17001).

label: Unemployment
definition: Unemployed share of the civilian labor force (ACS B23025).

label: Bachelor's degree +
definition: Adults 25+ with a bachelor's degree or higher (ACS B15003).

label: Median home value
definition: Median value of owner-occupied homes (ACS B25077).

label: Median gross rent
definition: Median monthly gross rent (ACS B25064).

label: Rent burden
definition: Median gross rent as a share of household income (ACS B25071).

label: Renter share
definition: Occupied units that are renter-occupied (ACS B25003).

label: No vehicle available
definition: Households with no vehicle available (ACS B08201).

label: Broadband internet
definition: Households with a broadband subscription (ACS B28002).

label: Uninsured
definition: Population without health insurance (ACS subject table S2701).

label: With a disability
definition: Civilian noninstitutionalized population with a disability (ACS subject S1810).

label: Diabetes
definition: Adults with diagnosed diabetes (PLACES DIABETES).

label: Obesity
definition: Adults with obesity, BMI ≥ 30 (PLACES OBESITY).

label: High blood pressure
definition: Adults with high blood pressure (PLACES BPHIGH).

label: High cholesterol
definition: Adults ever told they have high cholesterol (PLACES HIGHCHOL).

label: Coronary heart disease
definition: Adults with coronary heart disease (PLACES CHD).

label: Stroke
definition: Adults who have ever had a stroke (PLACES STROKE).

label: COPD
definition: Adults with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (PLACES COPD).

label: Current asthma
definition: Adults with current asthma (PLACES CASTHMA).

label: Current smoking
definition: Adults who currently smoke (PLACES CSMOKING).

label: No leisure exercise
definition: Adults reporting no leisure-time physical activity (PLACES LPA).

label: Depression
definition: Adults with diagnosed depression (PLACES DEPRESSION).

label: Frequent mental distress
definition: Adults reporting ≥14 poor mental-health days/month (PLACES MHLTH).

label: Frequent physical distress
definition: Adults reporting ≥14 poor physical-health days/month (PLACES PHLTH).
